stemHtml: The maximum cruise altitude can be limited by a 1.3 g load factor because when exceeding that altitude…

options.a: use of normal manoeuvring bank angles may cause the limit load factor to be exceeded.
options.b: turbulence may cause the limit load factor to be exceeded.
options.c: turbulence may induce high speed or low speed buffet.
options.d: high speed buffet will occur immediately after exceeding this maximum altitude.
